title: Synergistic effects of traffic-related air pollution and exposure to violence on urban asthma etiology.
ehr_evidence: No EHR or linked health data mentioned; study uses GIS-based models and passive networks.
summary: The study investigates the synergistic effects of traffic-related air pollution and exposure to violence (ETV) as a chronic stressor on the etiology of urban asthma, specifically looking at how stress might increase susceptibility to pollution.
key_findings: The study aims to examine the role of exposure to violence (ETV) in altering susceptibility to traffic-related air pollution in asthma etiology.
exposure_domain: traffic-related air pollution and exposure to violence (ETV)
limitations: Text is truncated at the methods section
